intro: Astragalus membranaceus decoction is a traditional Chinese medicine made from the root of the astragalus plant, which has been used for centuries to enhance the immune system and boost overall health. The decoction is typically prepared by boiling the dried astragalus root in water and then straining it to create a liquid extract that can be taken as a supplement. Research has suggested that astragalus membranaceus decoction may have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions.
